# Generated by docs-init — tech_stack is optional (auto-detected from diff); set only to override
# Base template: see hd-code-review/REVIEW_STANDARDS.md in your Claude skills directory (~/.claude/skills/hd-code-review/REVIEW_STANDARDS.md)

tech_stack: nodejs

aspect_escalations:
  - aspect: 12   # Architecture & Design
    level: blocker
  - aspect: 7    # Security
    level: blocker

remote_url: ~

custom_aspects:

  - name: "Layer Boundary Violations"
    tier: 1
    check: >
      No service imports a controller.
      No repository imports a service.
      One-way dependency only: routes → controllers → services → repositories → entities.
      Violations of this chain (e.g. a service calling req/res types, or a repository
      instantiating a service) are architectural blockers.
    trigger: blocker

  - name: "Payment Webhook HMAC Verification"
    tier: 1
    check: >
      All VNPay callback/IPN handlers must call VNPayUtil.verifyReturnUrl() or
      VNPayUtil.verifyIpnUrl() before processing the result.
      All MoMo return/notify handlers must call MomoUtil.verifySignature() before processing.
      Missing, conditional, or commented-out signature verification = blocker.
    trigger: blocker

  - name: "TypeORM synchronize:true"
    tier: 1
    check: >
      TypeORM DataSource or connection options must never set synchronize: true in any environment.
      Use migrations only. This flag will silently mutate or drop columns in production.
    trigger: blocker

  - name: "Raw Error Exposure"
    tier: 1
    check: >
      Controllers must not throw raw Error objects to the HTTP layer.
      All thrown errors must be AppError subclasses:
      ValidationError, UnauthorizedError, NotFoundError, or AppError directly.
      Unhandled raw errors bypass the structured error middleware and leak stack traces.
    trigger: blocker

  - name: "Vietnamese User-Facing Messages"
    tier: 2
    check: >
      All message fields in ResponseUtil calls (success, error, created) and all AppError
      constructor message arguments should be in Vietnamese.
      English messages in user-facing API responses = advisory.
    trigger: advisory

  - name: "Unauthenticated Socket Events"
    tier: 1
    check: >
      New Socket.IO event handlers must not bypass connection-time authentication.
      Authentication is enforced at the handshake/connection phase.
      Event handlers must assume socket.data.user is populated and must not
      re-implement auth or silently fall back to unauthenticated access.
    trigger: blocker

  - name: "Multi-step Write Transactions"
    tier: 2
    check: >
      Write operations that touch more than one repository or table within a single
      business operation must be wrapped in a QueryRunner transaction.
      See CheckoutService as the canonical reference implementation.
      Missing transaction on multi-repo writes = advisory (data consistency risk).
    trigger: advisory

  - name: "Direct Entity Serialization"
    tier: 2
    check: >
      Controllers must not pass raw TypeORM entity objects directly to res.json() or
      as the data argument to ResponseUtil methods.
      Entities may carry sensitive fields (password, passwordResetToken,
      emailVerificationToken, gatewayResponse).
      Always select or map only the fields needed for the response.
    trigger: advisory

  - name: "Admin Route Placement"
    tier: 2
    check: >
      Routes requiring ADMIN or STAFF role must be placed under /api/admin/* and
      their controllers must live in src/controllers/admin/.
      Admin logic placed in customer-facing route files = advisory.
    trigger: advisory
